title: os-shell — Manef Shell OS consumer of the AppShell framework
description: The os-vps (Manef Shell OS) consumer slice: shell.manifest.ts declares the brand + built-in app set + shell features, and the barrel re-exports the generic `appshell` framework so app slices import a stable `@/features/os-shell`. No backend — window layout persists to localStorage.

peers.reason: the generic shell framework this slice configures + re-exports
